title: Simple Order State
description: Implement an 'Order' class with states: 'PENDING', 'PAID', 'SHIPPED'. Transition methods 'pay()' and 'ship()'. Raise ValueError on invalid transitions (e.g. ship before pay).
test_script:
import unittest
from state import Order
class TestState(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_flow(self):
        o = Order()
        o.pay()
        o.ship()
        self.assertEqual(o.state, 'SHIPPED')
        with self.assertRaises(ValueError): Order().ship()
